hero.role: Mechatronics Engineer · AI Specialist · Robotics Technical Leader
hero.statement: Engineering systems that thrive in real-world complexity. I specialize in bridging the gap between theoretical design and operational excellence through rigorous testing and iterative implementation.
hero.tagline: Systems Engineering · Operational Execution · Sustainable Impact

about.title: Professional Profile
about.description: I view technology as a catalyst for pragmatic problem-solving. My professional trajectory spans across mechatronic engineering, specialized education, and strategic operations, dedicated to transforming abstract concepts into high-impact, production-ready solutions.
about.philosophy: I prefer systems that work for 10 years over brilliant solutions that fail in production.
mindset: Systemic approach: complete processes, not isolated tasks.
High tolerance for incomplete contexts and pressure.

items.description: Strategic leadership and operational execution for a last-mile logistics startup, focusing on scalability and data-driven traceability.
points: Managed end-to-end delivery control for +27,500 monthly packages via custom data systems.
Developed BaruLogix, a proprietary web platform for real-time tracking and operational re-dispatch.
Led intercompany coordination and labeling sorting strategies to ensure 99%+ operational continuity.

items.description: Leading an AI corporate training and consulting firm dedicated to bridging the gap between theory and Industry 4.0 adoption.
points: Delivered 6+ specialized AI programs for institutions like Colegio Bilingüe San José Campestre and Eduqualityco.
Pioneered courses on Agentic AI systems using cutting-edge platforms like Google Antigravity and Manus.
Specialized in AI adoption for diverse populations, including courses for adults 60+ at Centro de Bienestar Sagezza.

items.description: Technical leadership for the Colombian national team in the world's most prestigious robotics competition.
points: Achieved Top 4 Worldwide in 2024 (Athens) and 3rd Place in Engineering Documentation.
Responsible for structural optimization, regulatory compliance, and high-pressure competition strategy.
Led international relations and communication strategy achieving global recognition for Team Colombia.

items.description: Delivering production-quality digital solutions through accelerated AI-assisted development cycles.
points: Built and deployed 7+ production platforms using vibe coding methodologies and Google Antigravity.
Diverse client portfolio including BaruCourier, Carnitas by Mr. Cousins, and various educational entities.
End-to-end responsibility from requirements analysis to cloud deployment and maintenance.

items.description: Technical advisor for the 'Pacífico en su Salsa' project, optimizing educational processes through digitalization.
points: Applied Generative AI and Prompt Engineering to label design and branding for traditional Pacific entrepreneurs.
Structured and optimized digital learning environments aligned with Ministry of Culture standards.
Bridged cultural heritage with modern technological tools to empower local Pacific Coast communities.

items.description: Founding mentor for Colombia's entry into the FTC ecosystem, preparing for the inaugural national regional.
points: Leading mechanical design and build strategy aligned with international FIRST standards.
Responsible for materials selection and chassis construction for high-performance robotics.
Mentoring students in engineering fundamentals and regulatory compliance.

items.description: Educational robotics project lead, focused on large-scale FRC competition standards.
points: Designed chassis and complex mechanisms in full compliance with FIRST Robotics Competition regulations.
Produced high-level technical documentation for international engineering review.
Supported the construction and testing of functional prototypes for regional events.

international.title: Global Impact
international.description: Active participation in international science and technology scenarios.
items: National Leader at FIRST Global Challenge (Geneva, Switzerland 2022)
International recognition on social media Team Colombia

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: I am interested in projects where technology has a clear purpose, is executed with rigor, and generates real impact. Always open to conversations involving engineering, innovation, and building systems that work in the real world.
